summary: Iteration 161 — BEO Standalone, Client Approval Inbox, and Cake→POS routing testing complete. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All routes verified (/beo, /beo/admin, /pastry/look/{token} with approve/change buttons, /pastry/admin with approvals panel, regression routes).

minor.issue: Returns 502 when polling Stripe for unpaid sessions with mock key (sk_test_emergent). This is expected behavior - the mock key creates sessions but doesn't persist them for status polling.

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/pastry/look/approve creates client_approvals row with decision + note ✓
POST /api/beo-standalone/checkout/session accepts both package_ids, returns Stripe URL + session_id ✓
GET /api/beo-standalone/admin/subscribers returns {subscribers, total_subscribers, active_subscribers, mrr_usd, lifetime_revenue_usd} ✓
POST /api/cake-orders/ with version:'V001' returns {success, order:{order_number, pos_status:queued}} ✓
/beo landing renders beo-landing, beo-hero-title, beo-pkg-venue_monthly, beo-pkg-catering_monthly, beo-venue-input, beo-email-input, beo-checkout-btn ✓
/beo/admin renders beo-admin-page with KPI tiles (Active, MRR, Lifetime, Total signups) + beo-admin-table ✓
/pastry/look/{share_token} renders pastry-look-page with title, image, pastry-look-approve, pastry-look-change buttons ✓
/pastry/admin shows pastry-approvals-panel with unseen badge count, mark-seen buttons ✓
CakeViewerPanel has send-to-pos button (data-testid='send-to-pos') that posts to /api/cake-orders/ ✓
seed_data_creation: Test approvals created via POST /api/pastry/look/approve during testing, TEST_ prefixed cake orders created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter161 delivered: (A) Cake→POS routing via 'Send to POS' button in CakeViewerPanel - posts to /api/cake-orders/ with version:'V001', creates POS order + Stripe deposit link + production reminder. (B) Client approval inbox - POST /api/pastry/look/approve creates client_approvals row, GET /api/pastry/approvals lists with unseen filter, POST /api/pastry/approvals/{id}/seen marks seen. PastryLook page has Approve/Request-change CTAs, PastryAdmin embeds PastryApprovals panel. (C) BEO Standalone module at /beo with venue_monthly ($478 = $399+$79/mo) and catering_monthly ($348 = $299+$49/mo) plans. Stripe checkout creates sessions, status polling returns 502 for unpaid sessions (expected with mock key). Admin dashboard at /beo/admin shows KPIs + subscriber table. Collections: beo_subscribers (new, empty), client_approvals (has test data from iter161). Seeded data: rnd-demo-01 share token 65617132d8 still published with multiple client approvals.

backend_new: POST /api/pastry/look/approve with valid share_token creates approval ✓
GET /api/beo-standalone/packages returns 2 packages with correct pricing ✓
POST /api/cake-orders/ with version:'V001' returns order with pos_status=queued ✓
frontend_verified: /beo/admin has KPI tiles (Active, MRR, Lifetime, Total signups) ✓
/pastry/admin shows mark-seen buttons on approval items ✓
CakeViewerPanel has send-to-pos button (code review verified) ✓
